title: Select
copy: Your detachment holds the line. Select a unit.

title: Move
copy: Lit tiles are in reach this turn. Broken ground costs double. Order the move.

title: Action budget
copy: Every order draws from one pool, shared across the detachment. Spend them where it matters.

title: End turn
copy: Orders spent. End the turn. The enemy moves under the same rules you do.

title: Fog & ghosts
copy: You see what your units see. A ghost marker holds an enemy's last known position. Trust it less every turn.

title: Extractor economy
copy: Your extractor draws ¤ from the deposit each turn. Currency buys structures, repairs, and certain abilities.

title: Forecast
copy: The forecast is exact. Damage out, retaliation back, both outcomes. If the trade reads bad, it is bad.

title: Status marks
copy: Status marks stack beside the unit. Red works against you. Check the inspector for terms and time remaining.

title: XP record
copy: Kills feed the record. Harden at 2, new trait at 4, abilities at 6 and 7. Veterans are made, not issued.

title: Remnant nodes
copy: A Remnant console. End a move beside it to interface. Success arms the whole detachment. Failure costs nothing.

title: Objective pressure
copy: The objective will not come to you, and the enemy is not required to wait. Advance.

title: Commander stakes
copy: Your commander is the campaign. If they fall, this ends here. Pull them back.

title: Reposition
copy: This unit may reposition after striking. The move is free. Take it, or end its turn.

title: Turret
copy: That is a turret. It fires on its own at the start of each enemy turn. Stay out of the arc, or end it.

title: Build
copy: Your builder places structures on adjacent tiles. Walls block, turrets fire, relays feed the extractor.

title: Hold the works
copy: A unit standing on a friendly structure adds +1 to the action pool. Fortify, then man the walls.

title: Repair
copy: Structures take damage and fall. Your builder repairs adjacent works, at currency per point.

title: Amplify
copy: Idle currency is a wasted turn. Your builder can upgrade the extractor: more ¤ every turn after.

title: Army effects
copy: Chips in the strip modify every unit you field. Green works for you, red against. They tick down each turn.
